name: Paramount Communications Limited
summary: Paramount Communications Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells wire and cables to public and private sector organizations in India and internationally. The company provides power cables, including high tension and low tension power and aerial bunch cables; screened and unscreened type control cables; instrumentation cables for process control, A/D converters, and other microprocessor based instrumentation circuits; and thermocouple extension and compensating cables for connecting thermocouples to control and measurement devices. It also offers telecom cables comprising optical fiber, jelly filled, switched board, fiber to the home, and installation cables, as well as buried service and jumper wires. In addition, the company provides underground railway signaling and quad axle counter cables, and specialized instrumentation cables for underground and elevated metro projects; fire survival, XLPE, multicore round, solar, PTFE, and special cables; and building and PVC wires. Further, it offers turnkey services for construction, design, supply, engineering, and installation testing and commissioning. The company serves power, railways, telecom, IT and communications, construction, defense, space research, electronics, export, specialized EPC, renewable, and oil and gas sectors. Paramount Communications Limited was founded in 1955 and is based in New Delhi, India.
